title: rubus rilstonei
intro: Rubus rilstonei, also known as Rilstone's bramble, is a species of wild raspberry native to the UK. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Rubus rilstonei include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection against cell damage. Rubus rilstonei can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also sometimes used in jams and preserves due to its sweet-tart flavor.
